message.content:
Verify complete Redux removal from InvoiceCashbackSummary screen.

**Check:**
1. Read src/screens/InvoiceCashbackSummary/index.tsx
2. Grep for any remaining Redux patterns:
   - No 'connect' from 'react-redux'
   - No 'bindActionCreators' or 'Dispatch' from 'redux'
   - No imports from '../../redux/'
   - No mapStateToProps or mapDispatchToProps
   - No connect() wrapper on export

3. Verify the component is exported directly: export default InvoiceCashbackSummary

Is Redux completely removed from this screen?

file.content:
import {
  Box,
  Text,
  ListTextIcon,
  Button,
  Icon,
  BackDropBottom,
  Alert,
  Loading,
  SeparatorHorizontal,
} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
import { FC } from 'react';

import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
import { InvoiceCashbackViewProps } from './models';
import React from 'react';

const InvoiceCashbackSummaryView: FC<InvoiceCashbackViewProps> = ({
  handleGoBack,
  onConfirmRescue,
  onExitResult,
  isRescueLoading,
  isRescueConcluded,
  isRescueFailed,
  items,
  effectiveShowResult,
  onOpenDefault,
  modalizeRef1,
  formattedSelectedPoints,
  formattedSelectedReais,
  screenTitle,
  height,
}) => {
  return (
    <BasicScreen
      hasScroll
      hasHeader
      bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
      leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
      title={screenTitle}
      hasRightIcon={!effectiveShowResult}
      rightIcon="icon-help"
      rightIconOnPress={onOpenDefault}
      errorButtonOnPress={() => {}}
      isLoading={false}
    >
      {!effectiveShowResult ? (
        <>
          <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" flex={1} justify="flex-start">
            <Text
              color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
              testID="invoice-cashback-main-title"
              type="headingMDL"
              mt="smaller"
              mb="small"
            >
              Revise as informações para confirmar o cashback
            </Text>

            <Text
              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              type="paragraphMDM"
              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              mb="nano"
            >
              Valor em pontos
            </Text>

            <Text
              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              type="paragraphL"
              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              mt="nano"
              mb="xxs"
            >
              {formattedSelectedPoints}
            </Text>

            <SeparatorHorizontal
              mb="xxs"
              bgColor='BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02'
              height={1}
              width="100%"
            />

            <Text
              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              type="paragraphMDM"
              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              mb="nano"
            >
              Valor em reais
            </Text>

            <Text
              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              type="paragraphL"
              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              mt="nano"
              mb="xxs"
            >
              {formattedSelectedReais}
            </Text>

            <SeparatorHorizontal
              mb="xxs"
              bgColor='BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02'
              height={1}
              width="100%"
            />

            <Text
              align="left"
              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              type="paragraphMDM"
              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              mb="nano"
            >
              Cashback em
            </Text>

            <Text
              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              type="paragraphL"
              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              mt="nano"
              mb="xxs"
            >
              Até 72h
            </Text>

            <Alert
              label="O valor é aplicado e exibido nos lançamentos da sua fatura aberta."
              type="info"
              icon="icon-calendar"
            />
          </Box>

          <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
            <Button
              text="Confirmar desconto"
              mt="large"
              mb="small"
              onPress={onConfirmRescue}
              disabled={!!isRescueLoading}
              testID="invoice-cashback-button"
            />

            <Loading title="Aguarde..." visible={!!isRescueLoading} />
          </Box>
        </>
      ) : (
        <>
          {isRescueConcluded && !isRescueFailed && (
            <>
              <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" flex={1} justify="center" align="center">
                <Box
                  bgColor="PLUS_COLOR_03"
                  borderColor="PLUS_COLOR_01"
                  borderRadiusBottomLeft="medium"
                  pd="innerMedium"
                  borderRadiusBottomRight="medium"
                  borderRadiusTopRight="medium"
                  borderRadiusTopLeft="medium"
                  borderBottomWidth="small"
                  borderTopWidth="small"
                  borderLeftWidth="small"
                  borderRightWidth="small"
                  mb="small"
                >
                  <Icon name="icon-check" color="PLUS_COLOR_01" size="sm" />
                </Box>

                <Text type="subtitleXXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="small">Cashback aplicado</Text>

                <Text align="center" type="paragraphLG" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03" mb="small">O valor será aplicado em até 72h na sua fatura aberta.</Text>
              </Box>

              <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
                <Button
                  text="Ir para o início"
                  mt="large"
                  mb="small"
                  onPress={onExitResult}
                  testID="invoice-cashback-result-success-button"
                />
              </Box>
            </>
          )}
          {!isRescueConcluded && isRescueFailed && (
            <>
              <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" flex={1} justify="center" align="center">
                <Box
                  bgColor="DENY_COLOR_03"
                  borderColor="DENY_COLOR_01"
                  borderRadiusBottomLeft="medium"
                  pd="innerMedium"
                  borderRadiusBottomRight="medium"
                  borderRadiusTopRight="medium"
                  borderRadiusTopLeft="medium"
                  borderBottomWidth="small"
                  borderTopWidth="small"
                  borderLeftWidth="small"
                  borderRightWidth="small"
                  mb="small"
                >
                  <Icon name="icon-circle-alert" color="DENY_COLOR_01" size="sm" />
                </Box>

                <Text type="subtitleXXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="small">Algo deu errado!</Text>

                <Text type="paragraphLG" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03" mb="small">Por favor, tente mais tarde.</Text>
              </Box>

              <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
                <Button
                  text="Voltar"
                  mt="large"
                  mb="small"
                  onPress={onExitResult}
                  testID="invoice-cashback-result-failed-button"
                />
              </Box>
            </>
          )}
        </>
      )}

      <BackDropBottom modalHeight={height * 0.53} modalizeRef={modalizeRef1}>
        <Text type="subtitleXXL" mb="smaller" mt="smaller" align="center">
          Use seus pontos para pagar menos na fatura
        </Text>

        <ListTextIcon items={items} ml="nano" mr="nano" type="list" mb="smaller" />

        <Button text="Entendi" onPress={() => modalizeRef1.current?.close()} />
      </BackDropBottom>
    </BasicScreen>
  );
};

export default InvoiceCashbackSummaryView;

content.text: Perfect. Now let me verify the exports and check for any redux directory imports in the entire folder:

input.description: Search for any Redux references in the InvoiceCashbackSummary folder

content.text:
## Verification Report: Redux Removal from InvoiceCashbackSummary

**Status: COMPLETE - Redux is fully removed**

### Files Analyzed
1. `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackSummary/index.tsx`
2. `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackSummary/view.tsx`
3. `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackSummary/models/index.ts`

### Checklist Results

| Check | Result | Details |
|-------|--------|---------|
| No 'connect' from 'react-redux' | ✓ Pass | Zero imports of `connect` |
| No 'bindActionCreators' or 'Dispatch' from 'redux' | ✓ Pass | Zero Redux Dispatch imports |
| No imports from '../../redux/' | ✓ Pass | Zero Redux module imports |
| No mapStateToProps or mapDispatchToProps | ✓ Pass | No higher-order component patterns |
| No connect() wrapper on export | ✓ Pass | Direct export: `export default InvoiceCashbackSummary` |
| Component exported directly | ✓ Pass | Line 184: `export default InvoiceCashbackSummary;` |

### State Management Summary

**Current Zustand hooks used:**
- `usePermission()` - Permission domain
- `usePoints()` - Points domain (conversionFactor)
- `useRescue()` - Rescue domain (loading, error, status, request, reset)

**React Native Navigation:**
- `useNavigation()` - Navigation hooks from @react-navigation/native
- `useIsFocused()` - Focus tracking
- `useFocusEffect()` - Focus lifecycle

### Conclusion

Redux has been **completely and successfully removed** from the InvoiceCashbackSummary screen. The component has been migrated to Zustand-based services (usePermission, usePoints, useRescue) following the Hook Component pattern with clean separation between logic (index.tsx) and presentation (view.tsx).
